vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi mang tính hệ thống/mô hình
vocab.example: There has been a paradigm shift in how students interact with teachers, moving from strict hierarchy to a more collaborative exchange.

vocab.meaning: được tân trang lại diện mạo
vocab.example: The old campus has recently undergone a major facelift, with freshly painted murals and modern glass extensions.

vocab.meaning: lớp học không giấy tờ (học trên thiết bị số)
vocab.example: The transition toward a paperless classroom has been the most striking change, as tablets have almost entirely replaced heavy textbooks.

vocab.meaning: dấu chân carbon trung tính (không gây hại môi trường)
vocab.example: To promote sustainability, my school is striving for a carbon-neutral footprint by installing solar panels and green roofs.

vocab.meaning: sự biến đổi then chốt/quan trọng
vocab.example: The most pivotal transformation was the introduction of specialized coding clubs which didn't exist when I was a child.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy giáo dục hòa nhập (cho mọi đối tượng)
vocab.example: Infrastructure has been redesigned to foster inclusive education, ensuring full accessibility for students with physical disabilities.

vocab.meaning: sự am hiểu/trình độ sử dụng công nghệ
vocab.example: The focus has moved toward technological literacy, equipping children with the tools to navigate the digital world safely.

vocab.meaning: hệ thống an ninh sinh trắc học
vocab.example: Entry to the library and dormitories is now managed by biometric security systems, which is a far cry from the old manual logbooks.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất đa ngành/đa năng
vocab.example: New multidisciplinary facilities allow students to experiment with both traditional arts and high-tech engineering in the same space.

vocab.meaning: đặc điểm/tinh thần giáo dục cốt lõi
vocab.example: While the buildings are newer, the fundamental educational ethos of encouraging critical thinking remains as strong as ever.
